x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Security Incident Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist SIR AI insights are presented to analysts. Without it, AI-generated summaries and playbook recommendations are produced but never surfaced where analysts work.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_scope"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_si_workspace"); gr.addQuery("active", true); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Security Incident Workspace (sn_si_workspace) is active", finding: "Security Incident Workspace is active. Now Assist SIR AI insights including incident summaries and playbook recommendations are surfaced in context for analysts." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Security Incident Workspace (sn_si_workspace) not found or inactive", finding: "Security Incident Workspace is not active. Now Assist SIR AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface." }; })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate the Security Incident Workspace plugin via Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist SIR AI insights to surface in context for security analysts.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c37
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Security Incident Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist SIR AI insights are presented to analysts. Without it, AI-generated summaries and playbook recommendations are produced but never surfaced where analysts work.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Security Incident Workspace Configuration</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_scope"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_si_workspace"); gr.addQuery("active", true); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Security Incident Workspace (sn_si_workspace) is active", finding: "Security Incident Workspace is active. Now Assist SIR AI insights including incident summaries and playbook recommendations are surfaced in context for analysts." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Security Incident Workspace (sn_si_workspace) not found or inactive", finding: "Security Incident Workspace is not active. Now Assist SIR AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface." }; })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>SECOPS</module> <number>CHK0006159</number> <order>800</order> <remediation_guidance>Activate the Security Incident Workspace plugin via Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist SIR AI insights to surface in context for security analysts.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>5603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c37</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
